title: з®ҖеҚ•зҡ„еүҚз«Ҝи„ҡжүӢжһ¶
more:
з®ҖеҚ•зҡ„жҖқи·Ҝ

  1. еҖҹеҠ© Node.js е®һзҺ°е‘Ҫд»ӨиЎҢзҡ„дәӨдә’пјҢиҜ»еҸ–дҪҝз”ЁиҖ…иҫ“е…ҘпјҢеҸҜд»ҘеҒҡдёҖдәӣз”ҹжҲҗйЎ№зӣ®ж—¶зҡ„й…ҚзҪ®пјӣ
  2. еӨҚеҲ¶йў„и®ҫзҡ„жЁЎжқҝж–Үд»¶пјҢж №жҚ®з”ЁжҲ·иҫ“е…ҘеҒҡеҮәдёҖдәӣй…ҚзҪ®пјҢжңҖеҗҺзІҳиҙҙеҲ°жҢҮе®ҡдҪҚзҪ®гҖӮ

еҲқе§ӢеҢ–йЎ№зӣ®

еҲӣе»әз©әзӣ®еҪ•simple-cliе№¶еҲқе§ӢеҢ–пјҡ

$ mkdir simple-cli && cd simple-cli && yarn init -y

е®үиЈ…зӣёе…ідҫқиө–пјҡ

  1. commanderпјҡдёҖдёӘеҝ«йҖҹејҖеҸ‘ Node.js е‘Ҫд»ӨиЎҢе·Ҙе…·зҡ„еә“пјӣ
  2. coпјҡз”ЁеҗҢжӯҘзҡ„ж–№ејҸзј–еҶҷејӮжӯҘжөҒзЁӢзҡ„д»Јз Ғпјӣ
  3. co-promptпјҡеңЁе‘Ҫд»ӨиЎҢжҸҗдҫӣжҸҗзӨәдҝЎжҒҜе№¶жҺҘж”¶з”ЁжҲ·иҫ“е…Ҙпјӣ
  4. copy-template-dirпјҡеӨҚеҲ¶ж•ҙдёӘзӣ®еҪ•еҲ°жҢҮе®ҡи·Ҝеҫ„пјҢе№¶дё”иғҪеӨҹйҖҡиҝҮеҸҳйҮҸжіЁе…ҘдҝЎжҒҜгҖӮ

еңЁsimple-cli/пјҡ

$ yarn add commander co co-prompt copy-template-dir

еңЁpackage.jsonдёӯж·»еҠ binпјҡ

{
  "name": "simple-cli",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "license": "MIT",
  "dependencies": {
    "co": "^4.6.0",
    "co-prompt": "^1.0.0",
    "commander": "^2.17.1",
    "copy-template-dir": "^1.4.0"
  },
  "bin": {
    // йңҖиҰҒдҪңдёәе‘Ҫд»ӨиЎҢи°ғз”ЁпјҢиҰҒж·»еҠ  bin
    "simple-cli": "./index.js"
  }
}

еҲӣе»әзӣёеә”ж–Үд»¶пјҢжңҖеҗҺзӣ®еҪ•з»“жһ„еҸҜд»ҘжҳҜиҝҷж ·зҡ„пјҡ

.
в”ңв”Җв”Җ index.js
в”ңв”Җв”Җ lib
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ init.js
в”ңв”Җв”Җ node_modules
в”ңв”Җв”Җ package.json
в””в”Җв”Җ yarn.lock

ејҖеҸ‘

еҲӣе»әе‘Ҫд»ӨиЎҢе·Ҙе…·

еҸҜд»ҘзӣҙжҺҘдҪҝз”Ёnode ./index.jsиҝӣиЎҢиҝҗиЎҢпјҢд№ҹеҸҜд»ҘдҪҝз”Ёyarn linkеҗҺзӣҙжҺҘйҖҡиҝҮsimple-cliиҝӣиЎҢдҪҝз”ЁпјҲyarn unlinkеҸҜд»ҘиҝӣиЎҢеҸ–ж¶ҲпјүгҖӮ

index.jsпјҡ

#!/usr/bin/env node
// еӣ дёәжҳҜдҪңдёәе‘Ҫд»ӨиЎҢи°ғз”Ёзҡ„пјҢеңЁз¬¬дёҖиЎҢеҠ дёҠ #!/usr/bin/env node

"use strict";
const program = require("commander");
const packageJSON = require("./package.json");
const init = require("./lib/cmd/init");

program.version(packageJSON.version).usage("<command> [options]");

program
  .command("init")
  .description("еҲӣе»әж–°ж–°йЎ№зӣ®")
  .alias("i")
  .action(() => {
    // жҺҘж”¶еҲ° init е‘Ҫд»Өжү§иЎҢ init() ж–№жі•
    init();
  });

program.parse(process.argv);

if (program.args.length == 0) {
  // иҝҷйҮҢжҳҜеӨ„зҗҶжІЎжңүиҫ“е…ҘеҸӮж•°е‘Ҫд»Өзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢжҳҫзӨә help
  program.help();
}

./lib/init.jsпјҡ

"use strict";

// еҜјеҮәдёҖдёӘж–№жі•
module.exports = () => {};

жү§иЎҢsimple-cliпјҡ

$ simple-cli

  Usage: simple-cli <command> [options]

  Options:

    -V, --version  output the version number
    -h, --help     output usage information

  Commands:

    init|i         еҲӣе»әж–°ж–°йЎ№зӣ®

еҰӮyarn linkд№ӢеҗҺдҪҝз”Ёsimple-cliжҸҗзӨәpermission denied: simple-cliпјҢйӮЈд№ҲйңҖиҰҒеҜ№ linked file жү§иЎҢchmod +x ./index.jsгҖӮ

ж·»еҠ жЁЎжқҝ

ж №зӣ®еҪ•ж·»еҠ templates/templateA/пјҢжңҖз»Ҳзҡ„зӣ®еҪ•з»“жһ„пјҡ

.
в”ңв”Җв”Җ index.js
в”ңв”Җв”Җ lib
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ init.js
в”ңв”Җв”Җ node_modules
в”ңв”Җв”Җ package.json
в”ңв”Җв”Җ templates
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ templateA
в””в”Җв”Җ yarn.lock

з®ҖеҚ•ж·»еҠ дёҖдёӘжЁЎжқҝtemplateAпјҡ

.
в”ңв”Җв”Җ CONTRIBUTING.md
в”ңв”Җв”Җ README.md
в”ңв”Җв”Җ _package.json
в”ңв”Җв”Җ nwb.config.js
в”ңв”Җв”Җ src
в””в”Җв”Җ tests

# жіЁж„Ҹпјҡ
# 1. _package.jsonпјҢ_ ејҖеӨҙзҡ„ж–Үд»¶йҖҡиҝҮ copy-template-dir жӢ·иҙқеҗҺдјҡиҮӘеҠЁеҲ йҷӨ _гҖӮ
# 2. ж–Үд»¶дёӯзұ»дјј {{еҸҳйҮҸеҗҚ}} зҡ„ең°ж–№еҸҜйҖҡиҝҮ copy-template-dir иҮӘеҠЁжіЁе…ҘдҝЎжҒҜгҖӮ

е®ҡд№үinit.js

"use strict";

const { exec } = require("child_process");
const co = require("co");
const prompt = require("co-prompt");
const copy = require("copy-template-dir");
const path = require("path");

module.exports = () => {
  co(function*() {
    // еӨ„зҗҶз”ЁжҲ·иҫ“е…Ҙ
    const projectName = yield prompt("Project name: ");
    const description = yield prompt("Description: ");

    // жү§иЎҢ simple-cli ж—¶жүҖеӨ„зҡ„и·Ҝеҫ„
    const currentPath = path.resolve(process.cwd(), "./");
    // жЁЎжқҝи·Ҝеҫ„
    const templateDir = path.resolve(__dirname, "../templates/templateA");
    // иҫ“еҮәи·Ҝеҫ„
    const outDir = path.resolve(currentPath, projectName);
    // зІҳиҙҙжЁЎжқҝж—¶жіЁе…Ҙзҡ„дҝЎжҒҜ
    const values = {
      name: projectName,
      description
    };

    // жӢ·иҙқжЁЎжқҝ
    copy(path.resolve(templateDir), outDir, values, (err, createdFiles) => {
      if (err) {
        process.exit(1);
      }

      createdFiles.forEach(filePath => console.log(`Created ${filePath}`));

      // Node.js жү§иЎҢе‘Ҫд»Ө
      const cmdStr = `cd ${outDir} && yarn`;
      console.log(`now excuting: ${cmdStr}`);
      exec(cmdStr, error => {
        if (error) {
          process.exit(1);
        }

        console.log("\n вҲҡ Generation completed!");
        process.exit(0);
      });
    });
  });
};

дҪҝз”Ё

$ simple-cli init

Project name: test
Description: some description
Created /Users/daief/Desktop/test/.travis.yml
Created /Users/daief/Desktop/test/README.md
Created /Users/daief/Desktop/test/CONTRIBUTING.md
Created /Users/daief/Desktop/test/package.json
Created /Users/daief/Desktop/test/nwb.config.js
Created /Users/daief/Desktop/test/tests/.eslintrc
Created /Users/daief/Desktop/test/tests/App-test.js
Created /Users/daief/Desktop/test/src/App.css
Created /Users/daief/Desktop/test/src/App.js
Created /Users/daief/Desktop/test/src/index.css
Created /Users/daief/Desktop/test/src/index.html
Created /Users/daief/Desktop/test/src/index.js
Created /Users/daief/Desktop/test/src/react.svg
now excuting: cd /Users/daief/Desktop/test && yarn

 вҲҡ Generation completed!

з»“жқҹ

дёҖдёӘзӮ’йёЎз®ҖеҚ•зҡ„и„ҡжүӢжһ¶е°ұе®ҢжҲҗдәҶпјҢиҝҳеҗҢж—¶дәҶи§ЈдәҶеҰӮдҪ•йҖҡиҝҮ Node.js жһ„е»әдёҖдёӘдәӨдә’ејҸзҡ„е‘Ҫд»ӨиЎҢе·Ҙе…·гҖӮ

еҸҰпјҢиҝҳеҸҜд»Ҙж·»еҠ chalkжқҘзҫҺеҢ–е‘Ҫд»ӨиЎҢзҡ„иҫ“еҮәпјҢеҸҲжҲ–жҳҜеҸ‘еёғеҲ° npm еҲҶдә«з»ҷе°ҸдјҷдјҙдҪҝз”ЁгҖӮ

йЎ№зӣ®ең°еқҖпјҡhttps://github.com/daief/simple-cliгҖӮ

Thanks. рҹҳғ

prev.title: дҪҝз”Ёpromiseе°ҒиЈ…setTimeout
prev.excerpt:
дҪҝз”Ё Promise еҜ№ setTimeout иҝӣиЎҢе°ҒиЈ…пјҢд»ҺиҖҢж”ҜжҢҒй“ҫејҸзҡ„и°ғз”ЁгҖӮ

const delay = (func, millisec, options) => {
  let timer = 0
  let reject = null
  const promise = new Promise((resolve, _reject) => {
    reject = _reject
    timer = setTimeout(() => {
      resolve(func(options))
    }, millisec)
  })

  return {
    get promise() {
      return promise
    },
    cancel() {
      if (timer) {
        clearTimeout(timer)
        timer = 0
        reject(new Error('timer is cancelled'))
        reject = null
      }
    },
  }
}

дҪҝз”ЁрҹҢ°пјҡ

const d = delay(({a, b}) => {
  console.log(a, b)
  return a + b
}, 2000, {a: 1, b: 3})

d.promise.then((result) => {
  console.log('result', result)
}).catch((err) => {
  console.log(err)
})

// cancel
// setTimeout(() => {
//   d.cancel()
// }, 1000)
